message.content:
Run ALL of the following bash commands in the project directory C:\Users\User\citedby-ai and report EVERY result. This is a read-only audit. Do NOT modify any files.

**3.1 — Large files:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Fichiers > 500 lignes ==="
find . -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" | grep -v node_modules | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -25
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Fichiers > 1000 lignes (URGENT) ==="
find . -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" | grep -v node_modules | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | awk '$1 > 1000 {print}'
```

**3.2 — Code duplication:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Appels fetch dupliques ==="
grep -rn "fetch(" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | wc -l
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Appels Gemini dupliques ==="
grep -rn "generateContent\|gemini\|GoogleGenerativeAI" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | sort
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Patterns composants dupliques ==="
grep -rn 'className="bg-\[var(--bg-surface)\]' --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | wc -l
```

**3.3 — TypeScript strictness:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
cat tsconfig.json | grep -E "strict|noImplicit|noUnused"
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Utilisation de 'any' ==="
grep -rn ": any\|as any\|<any>" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | wc -l
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Pires fichiers en any ==="
grep -rn ": any\|as any" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | sed 's/:.*/:/' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -10
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== TODO et FIXME ==="
grep -rn "TODO\|FIXME\|HACK\|XXX\|TEMP" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
```

Report ALL results verbatim. Group by section (3.1, 3.2, 3.3).

content.text: I'll run all the audit commands in parallel since they are independent of each other.

cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && echo "=== Patterns composants dupliques ===" && grep -rn 'className="bg-\[var(--bg-surface)\]' --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | wc -l

cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai && echo "=== TODO et FIXME ===" && grep -rn "TODO\|FIXME\|HACK\|XXX\|TEMP" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
